contexts.context: ..., read with delight our own descriptions in the <mark>passport</mark>, looked with curiosity on every plât, fancying...
...learned to curse the douane,4 and denounce <mark>passports</mark> as tyrannical and insufferable impediments to our free progress...
...some light thro' time explore, The name's kind <mark>passport</mark>, when the man's no more.46
